ble-mioty.title: Joint Bluetooth and MIOTY Localisation Module
ble-mioty.description: Low-power localization tag combining BLE short-range tracking and mioty long-range fallback in a single 2.4 GHz transceiver. Custom circular PCB, 9-axis IMU, coin-cell powered.

JESD204C_Clock_Tree_Thesis.title: JESD204C Clock Tree — M.Sc. Thesis
JESD204C_Clock_Tree_Thesis.description: Experimental characterization, SPI-controlled reconfiguration, and optimization of JESD204C clock trees using the LMX1205 PLL and HMC7043 distributor. Targets deterministic latency and minimum jitter for multi-channel ADC/DAC systems.

7nm-finfet-standard-cell-library.title: 7nm FinFET Standard Cell Library
7nm-finfet-standard-cell-library.description: Designed and assessed a 7nm FinFET standard cell library using the ASAP7 PDK. Adaptable logic gates, optimized layouts, minimal footprint, and radiation hardening analysis for space applications.

smart-home-automation-ups.title: Smart Home Automation + UPS
smart-home-automation-ups.description: Automatic LED emergency lamp with an online UPS for low-power household appliances. Full circuit design, simulation, testing, and IoT integration for remote monitoring.

landmine-detection-robot.title: Landmine Detection Robot
landmine-detection-robot.description: Remotely-driven robot that detects buried landmines with dual inductive proximity sensors, tags the find with GPS, and SMS-alerts a bomb squad over GSM. Wireless camera for navigation.

USB2Optical-Converter.title: USB to Optical Converter
USB2Optical-Converter.description: A device that converts USB signals to optical signals for long-distance communication.
